lines.lyrics: Clandestine Sam, he's shakin in the middle of the room
Covert operations, covered up all the proof
Underhanded woman, insignificant love
Clandestine Sam, he's run out of luck
He was always in to the cloak and dagger
Illicit politicians, she loved money and swagger
Every Monday night she would loll him to sleep
Clandestine Sam, what does it all mean?
She's got your world under lock and key
Just like a movie, she's played off famously
Sam's predilection for a dangerous game has got him bent out of shape

lines.chords: Eb  Eb/D  Cm  Cm/Gb  Bb  Bb/A  Gm
lines.lyrics: A weakness in my appetite

lines.chords: Eb  Eb/D  Cm  Cm/Gb  Bb  Bb/A  Gm
lines.lyrics: Guilty of her delights but she won't just be mine

lines.chords: Eb  Eb/D  Cm  Cm/Gb  Bb  Bb/A  Gm
lines.lyrics: He went back to the mobile park, belligerently in the dark

lines.chords: Eb  Eb/D  Cm  Cm/Gb  Bb  Bb/A  Gm
lines.lyrics: And found Sally in the arms of another man
That's when things turned red and he pulled out his gun
The John he jumped for cover, Sally tried to run
With his double vision he unloaded his clip
And that's when Sam finally lost his grip
The law found out and surrounded the trailer
The sheriff yelled son, you should do yourself a favor
Frazzled minded Sam knew he had lost
But jail would never be the cost
He kicked the door open, pointed his finger and screamed
The night lit up like daylight, apocalyptic scene
He ate up all the ammo and fell down to his knees
Clandestine Sam was ready to leave
She had his world spinning so fast
Like the oceans of Venus, it was never gonna last
Clandestine Sam played a dangerous game, she got him bent out of shape

lines.chords: D7  Bb/A  Gm  Cm  F  F#  Gm
lines.lyrics: Things would never be the same, she loaded him down with shame
